---
name: Launch submission
about: Submit a new CLI launch for the builder feed
---

## Builder launch submission

Notes:
- Why is this worth featuring?
- Who is it for?
- Is this brand new, recently updated, or newly popular?

```json
{
  "name": "your-cli-name",
  "creator": "Creator name",
  "creatorUrl": "https://github.com/creator",
  "tagline": "One short line that explains what the CLI does.",
  "installCommand": "npm i -g your-package",
  "href": "https://github.com/owner/repo",
  "released": "New"
}
```
